name: Fish Citrus Salad
recipeIngredient: Large Fish Fillets (1 lb): salmon, halibut, or shark
Onion (1 large), sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish fillets into 3-inch cubes.
2. In a poaching pan, cook the fish and onion slices in white wine for about 8 minutes.
3. Let the fish cool in the liquid, then strain off any excess liquid.
4. Peel and slice the oranges thinly crosswise. Remove seeds.
5. For grapefruit, peel and section it, then cut each section into 2 or 3 pieces.
6. Peel and cube the avocados.
7. Toss avocado cubes with a bit of orange juice.
8. To make the dressing, blend olive oil, grapefruit juice, and mustard together. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Combine all salad ingredients with the dressing in a bowl.
10. Serve family-style, arranging oranges, avocados, and fish on plates. Drizzle with dressing and place onions over the fish.
